dashboard.title: Status

noEnvFile.title: No Environment Configured
noEnvFile.description: Please configure PHP, MySQL, Nginx and other services before starting the environment.

empty.title: No ps- prefixed containers found
empty.description: Please configure PHP, Nginx and other services in "Environment" first

startConfirm.title: ⚠️ Start Environment
startConfirm.message: During startup, Docker may need to pull images or download extension scripts. If you encounter network issues (e.g. GitHub access failure), consider configuring {proxy} first.

restartConfirm.title: ⚠️ Restart Environment
restartConfirm.message: Restarting will restart all running containers. {warning} to avoid data loss.

toast.portConflictIgnore: ⚠️ User chose to ignore conflicts, continuing...
toast.portConflictCancel: ❌ User cancelled, please resolve port conflicts first

portConflict.title: ⚠️ Port Conflict Detected

startTooltip.hasRunning: Containers are running, use Restart All instead

dashboard.restartTooltip: No running containers, use Start All instead

envConfig.title: Environment Config
envConfig.subtitle: Visually configure .env and docker-compose.yml
envConfig.startTooltip: Please apply config to generate .env file first

mysql.title: 🐬 MySQL Services
mysql.rootPasswordHint: Leave empty or enter "root" to use default password

redis.title: 🔴 Redis Services
redis.empty: Click "+ Add Version" above to add a Redis service

nginx.title: 🚀 Nginx Services
nginx.empty: Click "+ Add Version" above to add an Nginx service

general.title: 🔧 General Settings
general.customTimezoneHint: 💡 Tip: Enter a valid IANA timezone identifier, e.g. "Europe/Moscow", "Pacific/Auckland"

nginxHint.title: Nginx Configuration Reminder
nginxHint.description: PHP and Nginx services are both enabled. Nginx needs the correct PHP-FPM upstream address.
nginxHint.step1Multi: Edit the config file for each Nginx version (see list above)
nginxHint.step3: Change to: {example} (pick one of the addresses above, e.g. {hint})
nginxHint.step4: 💡 Tip: With multiple PHP versions, you can set different fastcgi_pass addresses for different server blocks

confirmOverwrite.title: Config Files Exist

toast.applySuccess: Config applied successfully! Files generated in {location}.
toast.backupPartialFail: ⚠️  Note: Some files failed to backup (may be in use). Please close related programs and retry.
toast.nginxConfigFailed: Failed to open directory, please manually open services/{dir}/conf.d/

error.dockerNotRunning:
❌ Docker Not Running

Please start Docker Desktop and try again.
error.permissionDenied:
❌ Permission Denied

Please run as administrator or check Docker permissions.
error.readFailed:
❌ File Read Failed

Please check if the file exists and has read permissions.
error.writeFailed:
❌ File Write Failed

Please check if the directory has write permissions.
error.parseFailed:
❌ Config File Format Error

Please check the .env file format.

mirror.subtitle: Manage Docker, APT, Composer, NPM mirror sources

dockerRegistry.warning: ⚠️ Docker Registry mirrors must be configured in Docker Desktop global settings
dockerRegistry.hint: Due to Docker architecture limitations, this cannot be auto-configured. Please follow the guide below.

editDialog.descPlaceholder: Optional, describe the purpose of this mirror

hints.title: 💡 Tips:
hints.autoApply: Clicking "Select" will automatically apply the config to .env file

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the custom mirror?
confirm.resetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all custom mirror configurations? This cannot be undone.

toast.deleted: Restored to default config and updated .env
toast.resetDone: All custom configs reset and .env updated
toast.testFailed: ❌ {name} connection failed, please check network or mirror URL

software.subtitle: Manage Docker image version mapping configuration

editDialog.title: Edit Docker Image
editDialog.descPlaceholder: Optional, describe the purpose of this custom tag

hints.title: 💡 Tips:
hints.editCustom: Click "Edit" to customize Docker image tags
hints.reapply: Changes take effect after re-applying environment config
hints.eolWarning: EOL versions are no longer maintained, consider using active versions

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the custom config for {name}?
confirm.resetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all custom configurations? This cannot be undone.

toast.saved: Saved! Re-apply environment config to take effect.

backup.title: Environment Backup
backup.subtitle: Export a complete backup of your development environment

options.title: 📋 Backup Options
options.coreConfig: Core config files (.env, docker-compose.yml, services/ configs)
options.logsWarning: Note: Log files may significantly increase backup size
options.patterns: File match patterns (one glob pattern per line)
options.patternsHint: 💡 Tip: Only backup files within the project directory for cross-platform restore compatibility.

restore.title: Environment Restore
restore.subtitle: Restore a complete development environment from backup

selectFile.title: 📁 Select Backup File
selectFile.hint: 💡 Supports .zip backup files generated by PHP-Stack

preview.title: 📋 Preview Backup Contents
preview.hint: 💡 Preview will show service configurations and file list from the backup

verify.title: 🔒 Verify File Integrity
verify.hint: 💡 Verification uses SHA256 to ensure the backup file has not been tampered with
verify.passedHint: Backup is intact and safe to restore
verify.failedHint: Backup may be corrupted or tampered with, do not use

success.title: Environment Restored!
success.description: You can restart Docker containers to apply the new configuration

confirm.title: Restore Confirmation
confirm.message:
⚠️ Warning: Existing config files will be overwritten. Consider backing up first.

💡 After restore, click "Start All" to run the environment.

toast.verifyFailed: Verification failed, backup may be corrupted

workspace.title: 👋 Welcome to PHP-Stack
workspace.description: To get started, please select a folder as your {bold}. All environment configs, database data, and project source code will be stored here.
workspace.pathPlaceholder: Click the button to select a directory...

error.invalidPath: Please select a valid directory as workspace
